channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Functional Cure for Hepatitis B Is Now 'Achievable'
item.description: Bepirovirsen reduced posttreatment markers of hepatitis B infection at 72 weeks, with 20% of recipients achieving functional cure vs none given placebo.

item.title: Obesity Drugs Work Best for Youth With Lifestyle Support
item.description: The combination of obesity drugs with structured lifestyle programs ranks highest for yielding the greatest weight loss in children and adolescents.

item.title: Cancer screening rates vary across sexual orientation and gender identity
item.description: New research has uncovered persistent disparities in preventive cancer care across different sexual orientation and gender identity (SOGI) populations.

item.title: Venetoclax-Obinutuzumab Boosts MRD Clearance in CLL
item.description: A phase 3 trial compares first-line fixed-duration venetoclax-obinutuzumab to fludarabine, cyclophosphamide, and rituximab/bendamustine-rituximab in patients.
